title: Fix persona avatar GIF display in lobby

log.context: Fix persona avatar GIF display in lobby

Done. Here's what was fixed:

**Root cause:** `/mnt/data/clungiverse-client/src/renderer/entity-renderer.ts` — `getAvatar()` checked `img.complete && img.naturalWidth > 0` to decide if an avatar was ready. For GIFs, these properties remain falsy until the browser fully decodes the image. Since the canvas render loop starts immediately, every early frame sees `null` from `getAvatar()` and falls back to the placeholder shape.

**Fix:** Added an `avatarReady: Set<PersonaSlug>` that gets populated e...(truncated)
